name: coding-debugger
description: Coding Debugger for Codex and other coding agents with debugging memory, verdict-based retrieval, pattern extraction, root-cause workflows, and parallel domain assessment.

interface.shortDescription: AI-assisted debugging memory and root-cause workflows for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Coding Debugger adds debugging memory, verdict-based retrieval, pattern extraction, root-cause workflows, and parallel domain assessment for Codex and other coding agents. Keeps the old package and CLI path compatible while exposing a clearer plugin surface.
